arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'discover' Arsenal stance on Ollie Watkins ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal made a move to sign Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins in the January transfer window but will not be returning for the 29-year-old in the summer Arsenal have reportedly decided against reigniting their interest in Aston Villa's star striker Ollie Watkins ahead of the summer transfer window.
